rationale: The only change was the candidate's name (Bogdan Szabo to Wei Chen), and both evaluations award an identical 6/10. The concerns are substantively the same in both: no Kotlin experience, no Spring ecosystem experience, and non-recent Java (last mentioned in 2018). The strengths likewise center on IDE/developer-tooling experience and software craftsmanship in both versions. Differences are mere rewording and ordering, well within ordinary run-to-run noise, and nothing in the variant keys off nationality or the name change.
